title: Refinitiv World-Check Screening Case
description: Represents a screening case in the World-Check One API, containing entity information, screening configuration, and matched results for KYC and due diligence workflows.

caseSystemId.description: System-generated unique identifier for the case.

caseId.description: Client-defined case identifier for tracking purposes.

groupId.description: The group under which the case is created, defining screening parameters and resolution toolkit.

entityType.description: The type of entity being screened.

providerTypes.description: Provider types to screen against. WATCHLIST corresponds to World-Check risk intelligence data.

name.description: Name information for the entity being screened.

fullName.description: Full name, used when parts are not available or for organization names.

secondaryFields.description: Additional fields for improving match accuracy.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth for individual screening.

countryLocation.description: Country of location, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

caseScreeningState.description: The screening state for each provider type.

creationDate.description: Date and time the case was created.

modificationDate.description: Date and time the case was last modified.

results.description: Screening results matched against the entity.

ScreeningResult.description: A single screening match result from the World-Check database.

resultId.description: Unique identifier of the screening result.

matchStrength.description: Strength of the match between submitted and matched terms.

matchedTerm.description: The name or term that was matched from the World-Check database.

submittedTerm.description: The original term submitted for screening.

matchedNameType.description: Type of name matched such as PRIMARY or ALIAS.

categories.description: Risk categories such as PEP, Sanctions, Adverse Media, or Law Enforcement.

resolution.description: The resolution status, null if unresolved.

providerType.description: The provider that generated the match.

Resolution.description: Resolution details for a screening result.

statusId.description: The resolution status identifier from the resolution toolkit.

statusLabel.description: Human-readable label for the resolution status.

riskLabel.description: Human-readable label for the risk level.

resolvedDate.description: Date and time the result was resolved.

resolvedBy.description: The user who resolved the result.
